controls.title: Ensured Governance Framework Setting and Maintenance
controls.text: Analyse and articulate the requirements for the governance of enterprise IT. Put in place and maintain effective enabling structures, principles, processes and practices, with clarity of responsibilities and authority to achieve the enterprise's mission, goals and objectives.
controls.evidence_expectation: IT governance framework document; board-approved IT strategy; governance committee charter; RACI for IT decisions
controls.assessment_procedure: Review governance framework completeness; verify board-level oversight; check IT strategy alignment

controls.title: Managed Risk
controls.text: Continually identify, assess and reduce IT-related risk within levels of tolerance set by enterprise executive management.
controls.evidence_expectation: Risk management policy; risk register; risk appetite statement; treatment plans; residual risk acceptance records
controls.assessment_procedure: Review risk identification and assessment process; verify risk register currency; check treatment implementation

controls.title: Managed Security Services
controls.text: Protect enterprise information to maintain the level of information security risk acceptable to the enterprise in accordance with the security policy.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security operations procedures; incident response plan; security monitoring evidence; vulnerability management records
controls.assessment_procedure: Review security service coverage; verify monitoring in place; check incident response capability

controls.title: Managed Performance and Conformance Monitoring
controls.text: Collect, validate and evaluate business, IT and process goals and metrics. Monitor that processes are performing against agreed performance and conformance goals and metrics.
controls.evidence_expectation: KPI/KRI dashboard; control monitoring reports; compliance calendar; audit findings tracker
controls.assessment_procedure: Review KPI/KRI completeness; verify monitoring cadence; check conformance reporting to board

controls.title: Managed System of Internal Control
controls.text: Continuously monitor and evaluate the control environment, including self-assessments and independent assurance reviews, to provide management with assurance regarding the effectiveness of controls.
controls.evidence_expectation: Internal audit charter; audit plan; control self-assessment results; independent review findings
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify internal audit independence; check audit plan coverage; review self-assessment quality
